version.description: Policy document schema version (D-01). Bump when required keys or semantics change.

default.description: localOnly.default — local-only mode default; must be true for maintainer-local posture (D-05 framing).

defaultPosture.description: egress.defaultPosture — default egress posture; deny_all blocks network subprocesses unless exceptionAllowlist + explicit flags align (D-05, D-06).

exceptionAllowlist.description: egress.exceptionAllowlist — ordered list of allowed egress exception ids; empty means no network egress (D-06). Each id may be referenced by per-run --allow-egress.

id.description: Opaque id matched by CLI/env allow flags (D-06).

channels.description: Channels this exception unlocks: claude_cli (evals/run.sh), llm_rubric_claude (llm-rubric grader).

networkDefault.description: llmRubric.networkDefault — LLM/rubric network off unless opt-in (D-08).

optInEnvVar.description: llmRubric.optInEnvVar — env name; set to 1 to allow network rubric when policy permits (D-08).

gatedRelPaths.description: entrypoints.gatedRelPaths — repo-relative paths that MUST load policy before doing work (D-09, D-10).

approvedPathRoots.description: publish.approvedPathRoots — path prefixes (relative to repo root) allowed for static publish artifact roots; use '.' for repo root (D-12).
